/usr/sbin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/bsa.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/esm.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/archive.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/image.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/hash.c.o CMakeFiles/f3tool.dir/src/util.c.o -o f3tool  -lz -logg -lvorbis -lvorbisenc -lvorbisfile -lpng16 -ljpeg -lm
